projects.name: Albony Mirror
projects.description: mirror.albony.in provides CDN infra for various opensource projects and linux distributions, this is a student run service which serves 20TB+ traffic daily and thousands rely on it to get their latest opensource software.
projects.short_description: Distributed Mirror Network in India Maintained by Shrirang Kahale

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: mirror.albony.in provides CDN infra for various opensource projects and linux distributions, this is a student run service which serves 20TB+ traffic daily and thousands rely on it to get their latest opensource software..

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: You can only connect the dots while looking backwards.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: I have an inner urge to contribute to FOSS in anyway I can, those traffic spikes on my servers keep me going :)

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
